header.description: Starts the workflow when a webhook is called

multipleMethods.description: Whether to allow the webhook to listen for multiple HTTP methods

httpMethod.description: The HTTP methods to listen to

path.description: The path to listen to, dynamic values could be specified by using ':', e.g. 'your-path/:dynamic-value'. If dynamic values are set 'webhookId' would be prepended to path.

responseMode.description: When and how to respond to the webhook

onReceived.description: As soon as this node executes

lastNode.description: Returns data of the last-executed node

streaming.description: Returns data in real time from streaming enabled nodes

webhookNotice.displayName: Insert a 'Respond to Webhook' node to control when and how you respond. More details

webhookStreamingNotice.displayName: Insert a node that supports streaming (e.g. 'AI Agent') and enable streaming to stream directly to the response while the workflow is executed. More details

responseCode.description: The HTTP Response code to return

responseData.description: What data should be returned. If it should return all items as an array or only the first item as object.

allEntries.description: Returns all the entries of the last node. Always returns an array.

firstEntryJson.description: Returns the JSON data of the first entry of the last node. Always returns a JSON object.

firstEntryBinary.description: Returns the binary data of the first entry of the last node. Always returns a binary file.

responseBinaryPropertyName.description: Name of the binary property to return

contentTypeNotice.displayName: If you are sending back a response, add a "Content-Type" response header with the appropriate value to avoid unexpected behavior

allowedOrigins.description: Comma-separated list of URLs allowed for cross-origin non-preflight requests. Use * (default) to allow all origins.

binaryData.description: Whether the webhook will receive binary data

binaryPropertyName.description: If the data gets received via "Form-Data Multipart" it will be the prefix and a number starting with 0 will be attached to it

ignoreBots.description: Whether to ignore requests from bots like link previewers and web crawlers

ipWhitelist.description: Comma-separated list of allowed IP addresses. Leave empty to allow all IPs.

noResponseBody.description: Whether to send any body in the response

responsePropertyName.description: Name of the property to return the data of instead of the whole JSON

rawBody.description: Whether to return the raw body

responseCode.description: The HTTP response code to return

204.description: No Content - Request processed, no content returned

301.description: Moved Permanently - Requested resource moved permanently

304.description: Not Modified - Resource has not been modified

400.description: Bad Request - Request could not be understood

403.description: Forbidden - Server understood, but refuses to fulfill

404.description: Not Found - Server has not found a match

responseCode.description: The HTTP response code to return

204.description: No Content - Request processed, no content returned

301.description: Moved Permanently - Requested resource moved permanently

304.description: Not Modified - Resource has not been modified

400.description: Bad Request - Request could not be understood

403.description: Forbidden - Server understood, but refuses to fulfill

404.description: Not Found - Server has not found a match

responseContentType.description: Set a custom content-type to return if another one as the "application/json" should be returned

responseHeaders.description: Add headers to the webhook response
